name: hero-city-pixel-perfect-hud
description: Verify the approved Hero City pixel crops drive the live HUD, mobile input shell, fist shop, and punch feedback without draft UI duplication.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui:WaitForChild("PunchWallHUD",5) local r=g:WaitForChild("PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD",5) local assets={PowerCard="rbxassetid://116369277219209",CoinsCard="rbxassetid://129024701441116",WallCard="rbxassetid://71796534980277",QuestCard="rbxassetid://98132697706518",DailyButton="rbxassetid://140223386174801",SpinButton="rbxassetid://107739720698002",RebirthButton="rbxassetid://129503393018469",ShopButton="rbxassetid://104281527974467",PetsButton="rbxassetid://94981950804472",QuestsButton="rbxassetid://130173685908715",ActionPunch="rbxassetid://86102957745205",ActionJump="rbxassetid://113344820616843",MovementJoystick="rbxassetid://105237841705957",SoundTool="rbxassetid://91707047961392",SettingsTool="rbxassetid://98048887733214",MoreTool="rbxassetid://103143983649151"} local exact=true for name,id in pairs(assets) do local item=r:FindFirstChild(name) exact=exact and item~=nil and item.Image==id and item:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIAspectRatioConstraint")~=nil end local noShells=r:FindFirstChild("BottomShellLeft")==nil and r:FindFirstChild("BottomShellRight")==nil local touch=p.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("TouchGui") local controls=touch and touch:FindFirstChild("TouchControlFrame") return H:JSONEncode({visible=r.Visible,exact=exact,noShells=noShells,powerValue=r.PowerCard:FindFirstChild("PowerValue")~=nil,coinsValue=r.CoinsCard:FindFirstChild("CoinsValue")~=nil,wallValue=r.WallCard:FindFirstChild("WallValue")~=nil,oldStatus=g.HeroStatusDeck.Visible,oldControls=g.MobileControls.Visible,touchControls=controls~=nil and controls.Visible or false})

steps.label: pixel HUD is exact and draft controls are hidden

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage:WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation") c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=120,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(-2,7,-13) local count=0 for _,d in ipairs(workspace.PunchWallRPG:GetDescendants()) do if string.find(d.Name,"Brick Wall Collapse Chunk",1,true) then count+=1 end end local shopImages,smashImages=0,0 for _,d in ipairs(workspace.PunchWallRPG["Fist Shop Sign"]:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Visible then if d.Image=="rbxassetid://104014193600358" then shopImages+=1 elseif d.Image=="rbxassetid://111791716595528" then smashImages+=1 end end end return H:JSONEncode({chunks=count,shopImages=shopImages,smashImages=smashImages})

steps.label: prepare brick wall with layered rubble
break wall through live client path

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local visible=0 for _,d in ipairs(workspace.PunchWallRPG:GetDescendants()) do if string.find(d.Name,"Brick Wall Collapse Chunk",1,true) and d:IsA("BasePart") and d.Transparency<0.2 then visible+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({broken=workspace.PunchWallRPG.Walls["Brick Wall"]:GetAttribute("Broken"),visible=visible})

steps.label: rubble remains visible in front of breach

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g:SetAttribute("AutomationTab","Fists") task.wait(.35) local shop=g.GameMenu:FindFirstChild("PixelPerfectFistShop",true) local cards=0 local icons=0 for _,d in ipairs(shop:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("TextButton") then if string.find(d.Name,"Card") then cards+=1 elseif string.find(d.Name,"MenuIcon") then icons+=1 end end end return H:JSONEncode({visible=shop.Visible,image=shop.Image,cards=cards,icons=icons})

steps.label: fist shop uses approved full-pixel design

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local burst=g:FindFirstChild("CombatDamageBurst") local rays=g:FindFirstChild("CombatSparkRays") return H:JSONEncode({burst=burst~=nil,transparent=burst and burst.BackgroundTransparency==1,rays=rays~=nil,rayCount=rays and #rays:GetChildren() or 0})

steps.label: punch uses transparent damage number and sparks
